channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Tillis Misunderstands Distinction Between Biden’s Weaponized DOJ and Trump’s Justice Efforts
item.description: Senator Eric Schmitt argued that targeting political opponents is weaponization, while holding accountable those who abuse justice is not.

item.title: What Is the Opposite of Donald Trump? Democrats Struggle for an Answer
item.description: Democrats counter the MAGA era with their own lack of seriousness.

item.title: Aviation Cybersecurity Has Key Shortfalls, Watchdog Warns Congress
item.description: The TSA and FAA have cybersecurity gaps that send mixed signals to stakeholders and fall short of standards.

item.title: Comer Moves to Give Congress Veto Power Over D.C. Tax Hikes
item.description: House Oversight Chairman James Comer introduced a bill requiring congressional approval for any D.C. Council tax increase.
